userStories.title: Fix error 500 in consulta libre - must return evidence_limited not crash
acceptanceCriteria: Reproduce the consulta libre 500 with a FATCA query
Find and fix the root cause instead of swallowing the exception
Valid unsupported queries return evidence_limited or no_results, never an unhandled 500
Empty and very long queries return 400, not 500
Add regression tests in apps/api/tests/test_consulta_libre.py
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/ai/consulta -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"FATCA passive entity modelo 290"}' | jq '.safe_to_answer' | grep -vE '^null$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-CONSULTA-LIBRE-ERROR

userStories.title: Alembic migrations for instruction/key/rule tables
acceptanceCriteria: Create Alembic migration for modelo_clave, modelo_instruccion, modelo_regla_inclusion and modelo_trigger_keyword
Review migration for unintended drops
Apply to test DB first, then production
Confirm all four tables exist in production
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c '\dt modelo_clave modelo_instruccion modelo_regla_inclusion modelo_trigger_keyword' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-TABLES-MISSING

userStories.title: Load Modelo 290 instructions, keys, and FATCA inclusion rules
acceptanceCriteria: Find and verify official AEAT/BOE sources for Modelo 290 and RD 1021/2015
Load official instructions into modelo_instruccion
Load account holder/entity keys into modelo_clave
Load verified FATCA inclusion/exclusion rules into modelo_regla_inclusion
Load FATCA trigger keywords for semantic routing
Every loaded record must have source_url, source_hash and capture_date
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; CLAVES=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_clave mc JOIN modelo_campana c ON mc.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='290'"); REGLAS=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_regla_inclusion mr JOIN modelo_campana c ON mr.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='290'"); echo "290 claves=$CLAVES reglas=$REGLAS"; [ "$CLAVES" -gt 0 ] && [ "$REGLAS" -gt 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Expose instructions and keys in API and MCP for Modelo 290
acceptanceCriteria: Expose claves, instrucciones and reglas_inclusion in /v1/modelos/aeat/290
Add or extend MCP behavior for entity-type inclusion decisions
Unknown scenarios return evidence_limited
FATCA passive queries route to Modelo 290, not IRNR
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/290 | jq '{claves: (.claves | length), instrucciones: (.instrucciones | length), reglas: (.reglas_inclusion | length)}' | grep -vE ': 0' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-KEYS-IN-RESPONSE

userStories.title: Load instructions and keys for Modelo 296 - IRNR no residentes
acceptanceCriteria: Load official Modelo 296 instructions and keys from AEAT/BOE sources
Load IRNR/no-resident trigger keywords
Update completeness only if evidence supports it
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_clave mc JOIN modelo_campana c ON mc.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='296'"); echo "296 claves: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load instructions and keys for Modelo 216 - IRNR retenciones
acceptanceCriteria: Load official Modelo 216 instructions and keys from AEAT/BOE sources
Load IRNR withholding trigger keywords
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_clave mc JOIN modelo_campana c ON mc.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='216'"); echo "216 claves: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load instructions and keys for Modelo 198 - activos financieros
acceptanceCriteria: Load official Modelo 198 instructions and operation/value keys
Load sociedad de valores and activos financieros trigger keywords
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_clave mc JOIN modelo_campana c ON mc.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='198'"); echo "198 claves: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load instructions and keys for Modelos 187 and 193
acceptanceCriteria: Load official instructions and keys for Modelos 187 and 193
Load trigger keywords for both
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; for C in 187 193; do COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_clave mc JOIN modelo_campana c ON mc.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='$C'"); echo "$C claves: $COUNT"; done && echo PASS

userStories.title: Load instructions for Modelos 303 and 200 - IVA and IS
acceptanceCriteria: Load official partial instructions for high-value sections of Modelos 303 and 200
PASS-WITH-CAVEAT is acceptable for complex partial instruction coverage
Load trigger keywords for both
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; for C in 303 200; do COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_instruccion mi JOIN modelo_campana c ON mi.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='$C'"); echo "$C instrucciones: $COUNT"; done && echo PASS

userStories.title: Update completeness status for models with full instructions + keys loaded
acceptanceCriteria: Use query-driven graduation only
Graduate a model to completa only when it has casillas, claves, instrucciones and source_url coverage
Leave all other models parcial
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aeat_modelo WHERE completeness='completa'"); echo "Models completa: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-COMPLETA-MODELS

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite: test FATCA passive routing and model completeness
acceptanceCriteria: Validation suite checks Modelo 290 claves/reglas
Validation suite checks FATCA passive routes to 290, not IRNR
Deep audit checks passive NFFE and active NFFE rules
Both suites return ok=true
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_validation_suite.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - full sprint close
acceptanceCriteria: consulta libre has no 500 errors for valid queries
Modelo 290 has claves, instrucciones and reglas_inclusion
Priority models have loaded instructions/keys according to scope
FATCA passive routes to 290, not IRNR
pytest apps/ -q passes
mcp_validation_suite and mcp_deep_contract_audit return ok=true
status and Alertmanager are clean
docs/aeat-instructions-coverage-report.md is written
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -E 'passed' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/290 | jq '{claves: (.claves | length), reglas: (.reglas_inclusion | length)}' | grep -vE ': 0' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
